description:
Jeffrey Martin’s fourth full length album, Thank God We Left The Garden, was produced and engineered by the man himself, recalling, "There was a magic quality to the sounds I was getting in the shack with these two cheap microphones, some lucky recipe of time and place that allowed my voice and the way I play guitar and the shape of these new songs to come together with the kind of honesty I was craving." The Portland-based singer-songwriter writes “songs that are stark in their simplicity, yet emotionally rich in a way that can catch your breath in your throat or leave your eyes suddenly damp.”

Concert: Sunday, August 10

Days of Sessions: August 9-10

Schedule is subject to change
subtitle: USA
title: Jeffrey Martin
